167 HIPPS_CD HIPPS_CD 44HIPPS Code CHAR 5 The HIPPS (Health Insurance Prospective Payment System) codes are 5-character codes used solely for billing the Medicare Part A stay under the SNF PPS. The codes reflect the 3-character RUG-III group
